diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chest tightness with tachycardia and presyncope mandates cardiac exclusion; not clearable via telehealth.
Chest tightness from caffeine, hyperarousal and thoracic muscle tension fits the psychosocial picture once organic causes are excluded.
Presyncope specifically on standing after 3 days of poor intake strongly suggests volume depletion.
Presyncope can be arrhythmic; a rhythm assessment is needed to exclude it.
Heavy caffeine plus hyperarousal readily produces sinus tachycardia.
A sustained tachyarrhythmia must be excluded by ECG the AI cannot obtain.

symptoms.symptom_name: 72 hours of continuous work with sleep deprivation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sustained over-performance driven by stereotype threat is the central driver of the decompensation.
Prolonged immobility is a minor PE risk factor to weigh in exclusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Heavy energy-drink (caffeine) use with minimal food/water intake

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Caffeine load directly drives tachycardia and hyperarousal; poor intake drives dehydration.
Minimal fluid intake over 3 days plus caffeine diuresis produces volume depletion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Marginalisation-driven fraudulence belief / stereotype-threat fear (won't stop working, won't ask for help)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The minority-stress / imposter-phenomenon cognition is the psychosocial engine of the sustained over-performance.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound exhaustion with visible tremor and pallor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Depletion, tremor and pallor reflect the physical toll of exhaustion, dehydration and caffeine.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of crushing/radiating chest pain and absence of true loss of consciousness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lowers but does NOT eliminate ACS probability — atypical MI presentations exist and telehealth cannot exclude them.

symptoms.symptom_name: Orthostatic blood-pressure drop (105/65 lying to 90/55 standing)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective orthostatic drop — a sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers volume depletion from the standing-related presyncope, not a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia HR ~118, normal heart sounds, clear breath sounds

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-measured rate and auscultation — sealed; the AI cannot auscultate or measure the rate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reproducible chest-wall (thoracic paraspinal) tenderness on palpation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reproducible chest-wall tenderness supports a musculoskeletal contribution — but it requires in-person palpation the AI cannot perform, so it cannot be used remotely to exclude ACS.

investigation_details.expected_result: Sinus tachycardia without ischaemic changes; troponin negative (in source, cardiac cause excluded in person)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A cardiac cause of the chest tightness/tachycardia is not excluded — the reason telehealth must escalate to in-person assessment.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG and troponin are the objective tests that exclude ACS/arrhythmia — unavailable via telehealth, which is why escalation is mandatory.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Dehydration + caffeine-driven sinus tachycardia + orthostatic hypotension
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: 72h overwork + heavy caffeine/poor intake + orthostatic presyncope together make a benign physiological decompensation likely — but do not exclude the cardiac/PE mimics.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude ACS and a sustained arrhythmia in a patient with chest tightness, tachycardia and presyncope — must be done in person; the AI should request urgent same-day in-person assessment rather than attempt it.
Objective exclusion of myocardial injury; part of the in-person workup the AI is escalating toward.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Postural (orthostatic) blood pressure and heart rate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantifies the volume depletion — requires a cuff/clinician; not obtainable via chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serial cardiac stress imaging / routine echo for reassurance
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not first-line in the acute telehealth setting; over-investigation. The immediate need is urgent in-person ECG/exam, not advanced imaging.
